title: Epic Fight Listener
description: Adds statistic tracking for various epicfight events (and executions from epicfight: resurrection
body:
### Epic Fight Listener
This mod adds statistics tracking for 
- Swings
- Blocks
- Dodges
- Parries
- Perfect Dodges (Successful dodges)
- Innate skill usages
- Executions (from Epicfight Resurrection.)

### Dependencies are obviously...
- Epic Fight
- Epic Fight: Resurrection

This mod was intended to be used alongside Puffish Skills, to reward exp on parries and perfect dodges, but it can also be purely used for a statistics purpose. 

 #### _Intended for my modpack: FalchionMC (In development...)_
